item.title: Yacht Delivery
item.description: Professional Yacht Delivery Service The Yacht Logic team provides the best in yacht delivery service. Professional captains and crew experienced in transporting both power and sailing yachts worldwide. Comprehensive, prompt and safe. What Sets Us Apart Owner receives a comprehensive report constructed from notes taken while underway — very helpful to new and used boat owners. The delivery survey is free, no additional cost to the owner, it is part of the delivery fee.

item.title: Professional Captain Service
item.description: Professional Captain Service The Yacht Logic team provides professional captain service for the short or long term. All captains are licensed Masters with extensive experience in diverse cruising grounds. Experience Our captains have experience in the best charter boat cruising grounds: Caribbean — Virgin Islands, Leeward and Windward Islands, Bahamas Pacific Northwest — Puget Sound, San Juan Islands, Gulf Islands Alaska — Inside Passage, Southeast Alaska, Prince William Sound Mexico — Sea of Cortez, Pacific Coast Central America — Costa Rica, Panama East Coast — Maine to Florida, Chesapeake Bay, Intracoastal Waterway Ocean Passages Our captains are experienced in major ocean passages including:

item.title: Charter — MV Peregrine
item.description: An Ultimate Adventure You Will Never Forget The Expedition Yacht Peregrine — explore the beauty and maritime history of the Pacific Northwest. Expedition Destinations Personalized expeditions through: San Juan Islands — Washington’s jewel of the Pacific Northwest Majestic Inside Passage of BC — Thousands of miles of protected waterways Queen Charlotte Islands (Haida Gwaii) — Remote wilderness and indigenous culture Southeast Alaska — Glaciers, wildlife, and frontier communities About the Peregrine The Peregrine was designed and built specifically to operate in remote areas — conceived, built and launched in 2003 by Bigfoot Marine.

item.title: Vessel Management
item.description: Professional Vessel Management Vessel management requires expertise, flexibility, and technical knowledge. Yacht Logic believes the goal of the yacht manager is to maintain a ship in ready-to-depart condition at practical costs. Our Management Services Routine Operations: Routine maintenance schedule for all vessel systems Regular inspection of ongoing maintenance schedules Support for spares/chandlery/purveying/fuel bunkering while underway Refits & Repairs: Coordination of refits, repairs, and maintenance Evaluation of suppliers and contractors Scheduled maintenance and repair scenarios Dry dockings and major refits Administrative Support:

item.title: Past Projects
item.description: Past Projects Yacht Logic has been involved in numerous significant maritime projects over the years. Here are some highlights from our diverse experience. Captain at San Diego Pilots Association Professional pilot services for the Port of San Diego, guiding vessels safely through harbor approaches and berthing operations. Yacht Delivery Extensive yacht delivery experience spanning decades, with vessels delivered across: Pacific Coast (Alaska to Mexico) Caribbean basin East Coast Trans-Pacific passages Trans-Atlantic crossings Vessels range from 27 to 300 feet, both sail and power.

item.title: Photo Gallery
item.description: Photo Gallery A collection of images from our yacht deliveries, charter expeditions, and adventures around the world. MV Peregrine Our expedition yacht, purpose-built for Pacific Northwest adventure cruising. Yacht Deliveries Professional delivery of power and sailing yachts worldwide. Sailing Adventures Sailing passages and ocean crossings around the world. Charter & Cruising Charter yacht experiences and cruising adventures. Antarctic Expeditions Operations in the Southern Ocean and Antarctic Peninsula. Destinations Beautiful ports of call and anchorages from our voyages.

item.title: About Yacht Logic
item.description: About Adam Jenkins Owner — Adam Jenkins, age 41, began sailing as a young boy and acquired his Master Mariners license at 18 years old. He started working as a captain aboard Puget Sound and San Juan Island charter yachts. The Journey In 1992, Adam embarked on a single-handed voyage down the Pacific Coast aboard Saint Brendan, his 27 foot sloop. After transiting the Panama Canal, he circumnavigated the Caribbean and explored the eastern seaboard.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description: Get In Touch We’d love to hear from you. Whether you’re interested in yacht delivery, captain services, charter expeditions, or vessel management, please reach out. Contact Information Address: 5655 Riley Street #201 San Diego, CA 92110 Phone: 619-405-5558 Email: adam@yachtlogic.com Send Us a Message Name * Email * Phone (optional) Service Interested In * -- Please Select -- Yacht Delivery Professional Captain Charter (MV Peregrine) Vessel Management Other Message * Send Message
